reasoning_model_1: The user's command required the text '快走，有人来了。' (Quick, someone is coming). Model 1 failed significantly in Content Accuracy, generating '嘘，快走快走，有人来了，别出声，悄悄的' (Shh, quick go quick go, someone is coming, don't make a sound, quietly) (0:00-0:03). This includes multiple hallucinations and repetitions not requested in the script. Regarding the paralinguistic feature '音量' (Volume/Whisper), while the audio does utilize a lower volume and a hushed tone, the delivery feels somewhat staged and 'cutesy' rather than a natural, urgent whisper. The significant deviation from the requested text constitutes a major issue.
reasoning_model_2: Model 2 perfectly adhered to the Content Accuracy requirement, saying exactly '快走，有人来了。' (Quick, someone is coming) (0:00-0:02). Regarding the paralinguistic feature '音量' (Volume/Whisper), the model executed this flawlessly. The audio exhibits a true whisper with unvoiced phonation (no vocal cord vibration) and reduced volume, accurately conveying the sense of secrecy and urgency implied by the text. The flow is natural and fluent.
model_comparison: Model 2 is the clear winner. It followed the content instructions precisely, whereas Model 1 added significant unrequested text (hallucinations), which violates the core content accuracy criterion. Furthermore, regarding the specific feature of '音量' (Volume) in the context of a whisper, Model 2 produced a much more realistic and acoustically accurate whisper (breathiness, lack of voicing) compared to Model 1, which sounded more like a low-volume character performance.
